raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California State Auditor’s Report detailed the mismanagement of the state’s Veterans Home properties.",
    "The Department of General Services (DGS) and California Department of Veterans Affairs (CalVet) did not assure lease revenue generated on Veterans Home properties were returned back to the Homes.",
    "The conditions at the Yountville Home must be improved after years of underinvestment and deferred maintenance.",
    "The planning and construction of the Skilled Nursing Facility will improve care for the residents and other veterans in Northern California.",
    "Vital resources intended to benefit veterans have been wasted or diverted."
  ]
}
```
